summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ryvenox Empire Phase 2 hardening & polish features. All validation, authentication, and game functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Password validation (8+ chars, letter, number) - correctly rejects weak passwords
Username validation (3+ chars, alphanumeric + underscore) - correctly rejects invalid usernames
Registration flow with valid credentials works perfectly
Login flow with existing test user works correctly
Invalid login credentials properly rejected with error messages
Game state API returns correct data
Frontend loads with proper UI styling and animations
Registration page displays password strength indicator
Error messages display properly for validation failures
Game page UI displays stats, click button, and upgrades properly
Success toasts display for account creation and login
